code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate Bollinger Bands
    bb = ta.volatility.BollingerBands(df['close'], window=params['bb_window'], window_dev=params['bb_dev'])
    df['bb_upper'] = bb.bollinger_hband()
    df['bb_lower'] = bb.bollinger_lband()
    
    # Calculate MACD
    macd = ta.trend.MACD(df['close'], window_slow=params['macd_slow'], window_fast=params['macd_fast'], window_sign=params['macd_signal'])
    df['macd_line'] = macd.macd()
    df['macd_signal'] = macd.macd_signal()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Long condition: price breaks above upper BB and MACD line crosses above signal line
    long_condition = (df['close'] > df['bb_upper']) & (df['macd_line'] > df['macd_signal'])
    signals[long_condition] = 1
    
    # Short condition: price breaks below lower BB and MACD line crosses below signal line
    short_condition = (df['close'] < df['bb_lower']) & (df['macd_line'] < df['macd_signal'])
    signals[short_condition] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: Gold exhibits strong momentum breakouts when price exceeds Bollinger Bands confirmed by MACD crossover, capturing sustained directional moves.
